caption: A screen recording shows a web browser displaying the "RANDOM.ORG" website, specifically the "List Randomizer" tool. The page features a numbered list from 1 to 10 in a randomized order, with an advisory stating, "We only operate services from the RANDOM.ORG domain." Below the results, the text "You have randomized this list 11 times" is visible. A sidebar on the right contains a message from "megabit" stating, "I think if you are a team signing Ohtani, you are going all in on everyone you can," and a message from "Nightbot" providing a link to a "BREAK SCHEDULE." At the bottom of the screen, a banner for "CASEBREAKS.COM" features an image of a man in a black t-shirt. As the video progresses, the user refreshes the page, causing the list to re-randomize and the count to change to "You have randomized this list 12 times."
